definition: Source reference has been identified, but no local structured snapshot has been created yet.
notes: Earliest usable registry status before localization work starts

definition: Local snapshot template file has been created and linked in registry, but official values have not been populated yet.
typical_next_step: Populate source snapshot fields from official/local evidence
notes: Best status for newly created source spine templates

definition: Local snapshot contains populated values, but final verification against source evidence is still pending.
typical_next_step: Verify amounts, dates, units, and source traceability
notes: May be used for draft analysis only, not final locked modeling

definition: Local snapshot has been verified and is approved for use in downstream pricing and cost modeling.
notes: Preferred status before feeding values into salary-calibrated or actual-cost-ready models

definition: A benchmark source is still missing and needs to be identified or researched.
notes: Used for unresolved external benchmark gaps

definition: Benchmark is useful but not required for the current minimum viable modeling scope.
typical_next_step: Defer until higher-priority gaps are resolved
